alerts.title: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
alerts.description: The app was ranking No. 57 on the App Store just before Meta AI's new model launched. Now it's No. 5 — and rising.

alerts.title: South Korean AI Chipmaker Raises $400M for Inference
alerts.description: The evolving AI market presents opportunities for new players, such as Rebellions, to offer silicon diversity.

alerts.title: AI Legal Platform Startup Reaches $11B Valuation
alerts.description: The rapid growth of legal AI was underscored by a decline in legal data provider stocks after Anthropic's recent release of a legal plugin for its Cowork agent system.

alerts.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
alerts.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

alerts.title: Amazon CEO Jassy defends $200 billion AI spend: "We're not going to be conservative"
alerts.description: Amazon shares have struggled so far this year as investors question the company's aggressive AI spending plans.
